conj.statement: All tiers (state/county/city) show evidence of policies that absorb critique (e.g., “equity” initiatives that reinforce racial capitalism). *Consensus solution*: Mandate *non-identity audits* across all levels. 2. **Spatial Erasure is Systemic**: Land-use policies across urban/suburban/rural contexts erase non-dominant ontologies (e.g., Indigenous, queer, disabled geographies). *Consensus solution*: *Counter-Archive Units* to preserve unassimilable spatial memories.
conj.subtopic: Negative Dialectics and the Refusal of Reconciliation
